title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time | Snurblog — Axel Bruns
snippet: A blog post by Axel Bruns provides a live-blog review of a session at the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) conference, detailing Fabio Giglietto's paper presentation. Giglietto's research focuses on partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook.
description: This blog post by Axel Bruns provides a live-blog review of Fabio Giglietto's paper presentation at the 2026 ICA conference, detailing his research on partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook.

Communication and Inequalities in Context - ICA 2026 Program
snippet: Fabio Giglietto, from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, is listed as a presenter (with Giada Marino) for the paper 'Clicking Politics on an Algorithmic Feed: Political Efficacy and Longitudinal Information Selection' at the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) conference.
description: Fabio Giglietto, from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo, is listed as a presenter at the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) conference. His presentation, 'Clicking Politics on an Algorithmic Feed: Political Efficacy and Longitudinal Information Selection,' aligns with his research in social media analysis and internet studies.
